entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: Anímase aos nenos menores de 13 anos a usar a aplicación, pero baixo supervisión adulta. Porén, non recollemos nin procesamos conscientemente ningunha Información persoal de nenos menores de 13 anos e prohibimos expresamente que calquera usuario menor de 13 anos nos proporcione información persoal sen consentimento parental. Se es nai, pai ou titor dun neno menor de 13 anos e cres que o teu fillo ou filla nos proporcionou Información persoal, tomaremos as medidas necesarias e avisarémoste se é preciso. Non hai un prazo fixo para a acción necesaria, xa que depende do volume de consultas que xestionemos e do noso persoal dispoñible.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.

O modo está construído arredor dunha tarefa concreta: aprender constitucións, democracia, eleccións, tribunais, dereitos, deberes e política pública.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: O modo de aprendizaxe con IA Collaborative Instruction é unha maneira centrada de usar a IA para aprender en vez de recoller respostas pasivamente. O modo está construído arredor dunha tarefa concreta: abrir un espazo de traballo compartido cun colaborador de IA. Crea un artefacto en bruto, intercambia edicións, cuestiona puntos febles, rexistra decisións e sae con progreso concreto.

entries.source: Convert the user goal into a rough shared artifact before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes." Ask at most one practical context question if needed, but still create the starter structure.
entries.value: Converte o obxectivo do usuario nun artefacto compartido en bruto antes de dar consello. Comeza con: "Fixen a primeira estrutura en bruto. Edita calquera cousa. Reaccionarei aos teus cambios." Fai como moito unha pregunta práctica de contexto se é necesario, pero crea igualmente a estrutura inicial.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Tes curiosidade por absolutamente calquera cousa? Pregunta, explora e afonda ao teu ritmo. O teu compañeiro fai que as ideas sexan prácticas, memorables e fáciles de ampliar. Proba: "Explica como funciona realmente o mercado de valores."
